name: io.github.machinegrade/validate
description: Deterministic validation of AI-generated artifacts: JSON Schema conformance, OpenAPI response conformance, SQL syntax. Typed verdicts with per-error fix hints, HTTP 200 verdict semantics, metered free tier.

environmentVariables.name: SANDBOX_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the validate API

environmentVariables.name: SANDBOX_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key issued via POST https://api.machinegrade.dev/keys (free tier: 500 calls/month)
